title: CleanWeatherDataset
description: Clean weather dataset produced by normalizing weather API forecast data. Maps to the Weather_Forecast ontology object.

forecast_id.description: Primary key - unique forecast identifier, generated during normalization

circuit_id.description: Foreign key referencing Circuit - sourced from weather API (circuit_id)

wind_speed_mph.description: Wind speed in miles per hour, sourced from weather API (wind_speed_mph)

humidity_pct.description: Humidity percentage (0-100), sourced from weather API (humidity_pct)

red_flag_warning.description: Whether a red flag fire weather warning is active, sourced from weather API (red_flag_warning)

forecast_timestamp.description: Forecast timestamp in ISO 8601 format, sourced from weather API (forecast_ts)
